stars.description: A lightweight, powerful framework for multi-agent workflows
stars.highlights: A lightweight framework from OpenAI for building multi-agent workflows with modular components and orchestration capabilities. It enables developers to create complex agent interactions while maintaining simplicity and performance.
stars.worthReading: It represents OpenAI's official approach to agent frameworks, offering production-ready patterns from the creators of leading AI models.
stars.scoreReason: High relevance for frontier AI topics (agents/LLM tooling), strong concreteness as a working framework, and moderate freshness as an established but actively maintained OpenAI project.

stars.description: This is a collection of the best SVG images of pelicans riding bicycles.
stars.highlights: This repository is a curated collection of SVG images depicting pelicans riding bicycles, offering a whimsical and creative visual dataset. It serves as a unique resource for artistic inspiration or testing image processing tools with unconventional imagery.
stars.worthReading: It showcases creative AI applications in generating or curating novel visual content, potentially useful for testing multi-modal models or as a fun, offbeat dataset.
stars.scoreReason: Low freshness (established but niche), moderate relevance (multi-modal dataset), and high concreteness (specific SVG collection).
